creator: mail@log69.com
text:
Hi,

Thanks for taking it.

I'd like to ask if there is still a chance to modify my patch or I have to send a new PR? I've come to know of a better solution regarding the clang issue.


Thanks,
Andras


On Sat, 5 Oct 2013 14:00:13 UT
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of graphics/aaphoto,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/182649 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/182649
>
